title: Upgraded 22.2v Type B Battery Replacement for Dyson Type B, Compatible with DC31 DC35 DC44 DC34 DC45 DC46 17083-04 917083-01 17083-2811 18172-01-04 17083-4211 Handheld Vacuum Cleaner (not for Type A)
features: 【Replacement Battery for Dyson 22.2V Type B】 Compatible with Dyson 22.2V Type B battery: DC34, DC35, DC45, DC44. ⚠️This battery is ONLY fit for TYPE B，NOT fit for TYPE A】

【Dyson 22.2V Type B DC34 DC35 Battery Specifications】: Battery Type: Lithium-ion; Voltage: 22.2V. An essential replacement component for vacuum cleaner maintenance. Our upgraded battery features an enhanced capacity, providing extended operational runtime for the appliance.

【High-Quality Cells】The upgraded 22.2V Type B DC34 DC35 replacement battery incorporates new, high-grade cells. It delivers an extended service life and more stable discharge performance, rendering it a near-equivalent replacement to the original component.

【Intelligent Chip Protection】The DTK 22.2V Type B DC34 DC35 battery utilizes high-quality imported lithium-ion cells, compliant with FCC and RoHS safety certification standards. It is integrated with multi-circuit protection mechanisms (overcharge, short circuit, high-temperature, and overcurrent protection) and constructed with flame-retardant materials, ensuring safety and reliability.

【Included Items & After-Sales Support】: Your purchase includes a replacement Dyson 22.2V Type B DC34 DC35 battery, battery cover, and installation screwdriver. We provide a 30-day return period and a 12-month limited warranty. For any inquiries, please contact us via the ‘Your Orders’ tab in your Amazon account – we offer 24/7 response support and will strive to deliver the optimal solution.
description: Product Description DC34 Type-B Replacement Battery Super-Power replacement battery for Dyson tyoe-B Suitable for type-B DTK type-B replacement battery is made for Dyson type-B vacuum cleaner and is perfectly suitable for type B vacuum cleaner, original docking station and original charger. Longer Duration The upgraded real 4000mAh battery provide your vacuum cleaner with super suction power and longer running time. Superior Safety Protect against over-charge, over-discharge, over-current and short-circuit. With CE, FCC and RoHS Safe certification, you don't have to worry about the battery damaging the machine. Fast Charging About 3 hours to charge to 90%. Universal Compatibility Only suitable for type-B series models: (please use 'Ctrl + F' to find your model) DC34 type-B /DC35 type-B / DC44 type-B / DC45 type-B / DC56 type-B / DC57 type-B DC34 / DC 35 / DC35 Animal / DC35 Exclusive / DC44 / DC44 Animal / DC44 Animal Total Clean / DC44 Animal Fuchsia / DC44 Exclusive / DC45 / DC56 / DC57 917083-01 / 17083-2811 / 18172-01-04 / 17083-4211 / 17083-04, etc. Easy to install It took about 2 minutes to replace the battery. The specific operation process can refer to the video on this page. Specification Cell type: Li-ion battery Voltage: 22.2V Capacity: 4000mAh Note: After using the battery, the battery will heat up. It is a normal phenomenon. Please do not charge it immediately, otherwise it will affect the battery life. Allow 15-20 minutes to cool before charging. What You Get 1 * Type-B Replacement Battery + 1 * Battery Cover + 1 * Manual.
